changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO categories (id, name, slug) VALUES ('cat-electronics', 'Electronics', 'electronics'); INSERT INTO categories (id, name, slug) VALUES ('cat-fashion', 'Fashion', 'fashion');

INSERT INTO supplier (id, business_name, name, email, status, state_id, flow_id, tenant, created_time) VALUES ('seller-1', 'TechWorld Electronics', 'TechWorld', 'tech@example.com', 'ACTIVE', 'ACTIVE', 'supplier-flow', 'homebase', NOW());

INSERT INTO user_profiles (id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, role, state_id, flow_id, tenant, created_time) VALUES ('cust-1', 'Priya', 'Sharma', 'priya@example.com', '9876543210', 'CUSTOMER', 'VERIFIED', 'user-flow', 'homebase', NOW());

INSERT INTO shipments (id, order_id, carrier, tracking_number, shipping_method, state_id, flow_id, created_time) VALUES ('ship-1', 'ord-1', 'HOMEBASE-LOGISTICS', 'HBL-TRK-001', 'EXPRESS', 'DELIVERED', 'shipping-flow', TIMESTAMP '2025-02-11 08:00:00');

INSERT INTO fulfillment_centers (id, name, code, city, state, pincode, active, capacity, tenant, created_time) VALUES ('fc-1', 'Bangalore FC', 'BLR-FC', 'Bangalore', 'Karnataka', '560001', TRUE, 50000, 'homebase', NOW());
